description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house set on a landscaped plot with a mix of grass and trees. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a combination of white and gray exterior walls, with large windows that allow for ample natural light. The property includes a detached garage connected by a driveway, and a spacious outdoor patio area with seating. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with trees and shrubs providing privacy and visual interest around the perimeter. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back to create a terrace or balcony. The overall design emphasizes open space, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a detached garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, and landscaped yard with trees and a driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, upper terrace, and more densely planted greenery behind the house.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the driveway, detached garage, and a spacious patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Rear/side view focusing on the back of the house, terrace, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and direct access from the driveway, no porch or decorative columns.
